place: Lipa Noi, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Fully-Glazed Beachfront Villa with Infinity Pool
note: Airport transfers · daily housekeeping · chef on request
blurb: A fully renovated beachfront villa on Koh Samui's west coast at Lipa Noi, wrapped in floor-to-ceiling glass that opens onto an infinity pool and the sand beyond — with three en-suite bedrooms and their own terraces, a full kitchen and dining area, table tennis and a mahjong table, and on-site staff with airport transfers, sleeping up to six across 250 m².
detail:
Set right on the sand at Lipa Noi on Koh Samui's calm west coast, this fully renovated villa trades on its position and its light — floor-to-ceiling glass runs the length of the living spaces, framing the pool, the beach and the sea beyond. An infinity pool sits between the house and the shore, with direct beach access just past its edge, and the west-facing aspect means sunsets straight off the terrace.

Inside, 250 m² is arranged around a relaxed, modern interior: an open living and dining area, a full kitchen, and three en-suite bedrooms, each with its own terrace and a jacuzzi bath in the mix. There is table tennis and a mahjong table for slower afternoons, satellite TV and entertainment systems throughout, and a sun deck for lunches out of the water.

An on-site team handles daily housekeeping with a chef available on request, and airport transfers are included on arrival. Lipa Noi's quiet beach, the Nikki Beach club and Nathon town's ferries and markets are all a short drive along the coast, making the villa an easy base for couples or a small family — pets and children welcome.

features.l: Beachfront infinity pool with direct beach access
Three en-suite bedrooms with private terraces
Full kitchen, dining area & sun deck
On-site staff, airport transfers & chef on request
